mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises by more than 0.5 percentage points within a single month, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger risk-off positioning, depressing S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 50% over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in housing starts and a deceleration in real GDP growth indicates a synchronized demand shock that compresses corporate revenue expectations, leading to negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns in more than 55% of historical instances, or the combined proxy correlation drops below 0.2 without degrading predictive power.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the industrial production index signals supply chain bottlenecks and capacity constraints that erode profit margins, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns remain positive or neutral in > 65% of triggered episodes, or the signal's information coefficient decays to zero after controlling for sector rotation.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment, any increase in the federal funds rate accelerates real rate normalization, compressing equity multiples and driving negative short-term market performance.
failure_condition: Equity returns are not significantly negative when rates rise alongside CPI above the threshold, or the signal's predictive power vanishes when controlling for VIX spikes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit balances indicate sustained household spending power that supports corporate earnings growth, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are not positively correlated with credit growth, or the signal's rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between strong payroll growth and a rising unemployment rate reflects labor market friction and wage-push inflation, which forces monetary tightening and depresses equity valuations over the following month.
failure_condition: The divergence signal fails to predict negative returns in > 50% of instances, or the interaction term loses statistical significance when added to a baseline macro factor model.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production alongside stable housing construction indicates a broad-based manufacturing upcycle that lifts corporate revenues, driving positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are not significantly positive during industrial acceleration phases, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 52% over a 3-year walk-forward test.
